results.title: Manager, Global Product Analytics, Data Science at Live Nation Entertainment - United States Remote
highlights:
Manager, Global Product Analytics, Data Science at Live Nation Entertainment - United States Remote
...
# Manager, Global Product Analytics, Data Science
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and measure key product metrics aligned with business objectives. • Lead data science workstreams including predictive modeling, segmentation, and forecasting to drive product decisions and revenue impact. • Evaluate and prototype AI-powered analytical solutions that support forecasting, product optimization, and operational efficiency. • Utilize data analysis to uncover trends, patterns, and opportunities that influence product strategy and experience optimization. • Translate business requirements into scalable analytical solutions and measurement frameworks. • Develop dashboards and recurring analyses to monitor product performance and proactively surface opportunities for revenue and experience improvement. • Present findings and recommendations to technical and non-technical audiences in a clear and compelling manner. • Support data governance and ensure the accuracy, reliability, and consistency of analytics reporting. • Partner with Product, Design, Engineering, and Marketing teams to support roadmap prioritization and business planning.
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• 3+ years of experience in product analytics or data science role • Advanced proficiency in Python applied to statistical modeling, predictive analytics, segmentation, forecasting, and machine learning in a product or digital analytics context • Hands-on experience with generative AI, LLM applications, and AI-enabled analytics workflows • Strong expertise in SQL and Google BigQuery • Experience working with large-scale datasets and cloud-based platforms such as Databricks • Hands-on experience with digital analytics platforms such as Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics, Contentsquare, Monetate, or Mixpanel • Familiarity with A/B and multivariate experimentation frameworks • Bachelor’s degree in Analytics, Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, or equivalent practical experience.

results.title: Privacy / AI Governance Analyst | Hirro
highlights:
Privacy / AI Governance Analyst | Hirro
...
# Privacy / AI Governance Analyst
...
Posted 2026-06-2
...
Live Nation Entertainment is the world’s leading live entertainment company, comprised of global market leaders: Ticketmaster, Live Nation Concerts, and Live Nation Media & Sponsorship. Ticketmaster is the global leader in event ticketing with over 620 million tickets sold annually and approximately 10,000 clients worldwide. Live Nation Concerts is the largest provider of live entertainment in the world promoting more than 50,000 events annually for nearly 7,000 artists in 40+ countries. These businesses allow Live Nation Media & Sponsorship to create strategic music marketing programs that connect more than 1,200 sponsors with the 145 million fans that attend Live Nation Entertainment events each year. For additional information, visit www.livenationentertainment.com.
...
Our goal is to maintain the trust and confidence of our fans, artists, employees, and partners. Our handling of personal information is designed to put the individual in control, putting them at the centre of all that we do and ensuring that we handle their information in a way that best serves them. As Privacy & AI Governance Analyst, you will be part of a dynamic, friendly, and experienced global team supporting and advising on privacy issues impacting Live Nation Entertainment’s businesses and offerings across the globe. We are about putting on the best experiences possible for our fans and the Privacy team’s goal is helping the business develop exciting offerings & products that respect fan security and privacy. You will work directly with the business, including our Product and Technology teams, as well as across shared services such as Legal, Compliance, Information Security & Audit on Live Nation Entertainment activities and regulatory matters.
...

You will work directly with the business, including our Product and Technology teams, as well as across shared services such as Legal, Compliance, Information Security & Audit on Live Nation Entertainment activities and regulatory matters.

## Live Nation Entertainment
...
Live Nation Entertainment is the global leader in live entertainment, powering unforgettable experiences around the world. Artist-powered and fan-driven, Live Nation works with musicians to bring their creativity to life on stages across the globe. As the top producer of concerts, ticket seller, and brand connector to music, Live Nation's platform leads the market in these three core industries. Their mission extends beyond entertainment, aiming to uplift, inspire, and create memories through the power of live music.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Be an expert in our fan data, helping to identify and fill data gaps, using internal resources and outside vendors • Create and maintain live analytics reports and dashboards to provide insight into the performance of campaigns to stakeholders • Conduct in-depth marketing analysis efforts to provide insight into new business opportunities; present findings and make recommendations to stakeholders • Support data-related problem-solving and product development efforts by the Fan-Based Marketing team • Model and size audiences relevant to support campaign objectives • Collaborate with division Business Analysts, Data Services and other functional teams as needed to understand the impact of analysis across multiple areas of the business
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• 2+ years of experience in marketing analytics, data analysis, or related field • Proficiency in SQL, including joins, aggregation, and nested queries • Strong statistical knowledge, with experience in hypothesis testing, regression analysis, and A/B testing methodologies • Experience with data visualization and presentation of analysis and findings • Exceptional quantitative, analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to draw insights and recommendations from analysis and present proposals to internal stakeholders • MS Excel proficiency, including lookups, pivot tables, and complex formulas • Detail-oriented with strong time management and organizational skills • Proactive and intellectually curious • Demonstrated ability to learn new skills and familiarize oneself with new software and technologies • Strong communication skills, including the ability to communicate findings to a wide audience.

results.title: Live Nation Entertainment AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Live Nation Entertainment is strategically positioning AI as a core differentiator in the live entertainment industry, with new Ticketmaster Global President Saumil Mehta leading an AI transformation focused on 'soup to nuts' implementation across all operations[1]. The company is leveraging AI for dynamic pricing that adjusts every 5 minutes based on real-time demand, fraud detection systems that block 200 million bots daily (a fivefold increase since 2019), and predictive analytics for crowd management and revenue optimization[2]. Live Nation's partnership with Google on agentic AI capabilities for search discovery and its collaboration with Snap on AR experiences at 16 major festivals demonstrate the company's commitment to enhancing fan experiences through intelligent technology[3][4].

results.title: Nikhil Deshpande
highlights:
Senior Software Engineer @ Live Nation | Marketing Data Engineering at scale (Databricks, AWS, Spark) | Pod lead | Building agentic AI for audience segmentation
...
I lead engineering for the marketing data pod at Live Nation Entertainment — the team behind the campaigns, recommendations, and personalization that reach fans before a tour goes on sale. Twelve years at Live Nation, currently a Senior Software Engineer on the Marketing Science & Engineering team. I run a pod of engineers and own the technical direction across two sides of the marketing stack: the SFMC side, where we build, architect, and maintain campaign infrastructure and Marketer Controlled Modules; and the data engineering side, where we're moving marketing workloads onto Databricks and AWS. The work sits at the intersection of three things I care about: large-scale data engineering, marketing and customer domain depth, and the privacy and compliance bar that comes with operating customer data under CASL and CCPA. What I'm building right now: - Agentic AI for audience segmentation, using Databricks and Claude — getting LLM agents to do real, auditable work on customer data, not demos. - Migrating audience creation out of Salesforce Marketing Cloud into Databricks, part of a broader org-wide shift toward a lakehouse-first marketing stack. - Coding standards and engineering culture for a six-person pod that ships into production for the CRM, Measurement, and Product teams. Stack I actually use: Databricks/PySpark, AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC), Terraform, Python, SQL across Teradata/Databricks/MSSQL/MySQL, Salesforce Marketing Cloud + AMPScript, Tableau. What I think and work about is at the seam between MarTech, data engineering, and applied AI: what works in production, what doesn't, and what the next version of a marketing data stack actually looks like.
...
Promoted to lead the marketing data engineering pod —spanning SFMC and software engineering disciplines — owning technical direction across SFMC campaign development, architecture, and maintenance as well as the broader migration of marketing workloads onto Databricks and AWS. The pod ships into production for CRM, Measurement, Product, and Program Management.
...
- Agentic AI for audience segmentation. Building production agent workflows on Databricks with Claude, letting marketers define and refine audiences in natural language with auditable, reviewable outputs.
...
